title: 'Hope For Justice Shattered': Kejriwal Refuses To Appear Before Delhi HC Judge In Excise Policy Scam Case, Cites Satyagraha
description: This comes after the Delhi High Court dismissed his plea seeking the recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta in the excise policy case. The AAP chief had alleged a perceived conflict of interest arising from the empanelment of the judge's children as Central Government counsel and argued that this creates a reasonable apprehension of bias.
